reasoning: The market traded at 0.90 on Feb 20, 2025. Strong evidence from throughout 2024 and early 2025 points to a drastic scale-back of Phase 1 of 'The Line' from 1.5 million to under 300,000 residents, and physical length from 170km to just 2.4km. A January 2025 project update suggested a modified '100-year timeframe' for full completion of The Line, which effectively acts as an indefinite delay or scale-back in practical forecasting periods. Even though the Saudi government has officially denied a scale-back by arguing it was always meant to be built in phases, the market creator’s resolution criteria explicitly includes 'scaled back to something vastly more modest (at my discretion)' alongside an expressed personal skepticism about the project. These factors make a YES resolution highly likely, in close agreement with the mature market probability of 0.90.
